form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of seven months. Finished off last preparation second of 10 at Ellerslie in the G3 Gold Trail September 6 over 1200m, soft track; 0.8 len behind Lollapalooza with 56.5kg at $3.40. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by head Taupo 3yo F SWP August 17 over 1100m in the wet defeating Lollapalooza with 56.5kg at $3.70. Classy NZ filly who looks very well placed here.
